concerns.text: FR-004 condition 2 and 3 reference a confidence‑interval level marked as `[deferred]`. Without a concrete confidence level (e.g., 95 %), the rule “reported p‑value lies outside the confidence interval derived from the reconstructed test (at [deferred] level)” cannot be operationalised nor measured.

FR-005 requires computing a Wilson confidence interval but the confidence level is left as `[deferred]`. The interval width cannot be determined, preventing verification that the correct CI is produced.
